title: Erasmus Studio Ano Poli: Stunning 1-Bed Base

about.summary: Erasmus studio Ano Poli located in the traditional Kleious building near City Centre Thessaloniki. This stunning studio is ideal for students, Erasmus students, and digital nomads looking for comfortable student accommodation.

sections.title: Erasmus Studio Ano Poli Guide
sections.content: This studio offers an excellent base for your studies. It features a 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed configuration, making it a stunning private setup. You will find everything needed for your convenience.
highlights: Fully equipped: The studio has the essentials for student accommodation.
Erasmus housing: Ideal for Erasmus students wanting to experience the area.
Flexible stay: Great setup for digital nomads with a dedicated workspace.

sections.title: Location near City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: The building is located at the beginning of Ano Poli, just a short distance from City Centre Thessaloniki. Daily errands are super easy with shops right around the corner. City attractions are highly accessible.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarkets and cafes are around 50 meters away.
University access: Aristotle University and City College are within easy walking distance.
Walkable area: The commercial center is a short walk, reducing bus use.

sections.title: Bills, Services & Links
sections.content: Maintenance, water, and Wi-Fi are included in the rent. Electricity is paid separately. For more information, check out this Thessaloniki travel guide. We would love to host you in this comfortable studio. Check out our other Kleious listings.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: negotiable. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Erasmus Studio Ano Poli: Stunning 1-Bed Base
seo.seo_description: Erasmus studio Ano Poli ideal for Erasmus students. This stunning 1-bed base is near Aristotle University, ideal for digital nomads.
